'''Imperial Sovereign Protectors''', also known as '''Royal Guard Champions''', were the most elite cadre of [[Bodyguard/Legends|guardsmen]] in the [[Dark Empire]] of the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:Imperial_Sovereign_Protector.jpg|thumb|left|200px|An Imperial Sovereign Protector during [[Operation Shadow Hand]]]]
The uniforms of the Sovereign Protectors were similar in appearance to the standard garb of the [[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Emperor's Royal Guard]], although with several distinctions. Namely, they possessed a black chest-plate and gauntlets, their helmets' front was colored black while the rest was red, and they wore a black cape. In some cases, they wore ornate armor with hoods and a scythe-like force pike. They were led mostly by a Champion picked by the Emperor, and they directly answered to the Emperor alone.

Only the best of the elite Emperor's Royal Guard were specially chosen to become Sovereign Protectors. They endured years of selection procedures and training aimed at achieving perfection in soldiering. Extreme standards were set for combat fitness, stamina, strength, dexterity, mental acuity, reaction time, loyalty and intelligence. Their combat training included the use of [[Heavy blaster pistol/Legends|heavy blaster pistols]] and the deadly [[double vibroblade]].<ref name="Force Unleashed Campaign Guide">''[[The Force Unleashed Campaign Guide]]''</ref> They also had access to [[Emperor's Royal Guard TIE/IN starfighter]]s, and were often sent on extremely vital missions.

==History==
[[File:Royal_Guard_Champion.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A Royal Guard Champion]]
Some of these armored and robed soldiers were charged with the personal protection of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], while others were deployed to guard Palpatine's interests throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], including the [[Emperor's Citadel]] on the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Byss/Legends|Byss]], as well as other palaces and monasteries. A number of Sovereign Protectors were stationed aboard the [[Eclipse-class dreadnought|dreadnought]] [[Eclipse (Eclipse-class)|''Eclipse'']]. They were typically organized into [[Regiment/Legends|regiments]] of four hundred individuals.

The best known of the Sovereign Protectors was the treacherous Royal Guardsman [[Carnor Jax]], who was promoted to the rank in [[11 ABY/Legends|11 ABY]] at the instigation of [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends|Imperial Ruling Council]] member [[Sarcev Quest]]. Though Palpatine remained unaware, Jax and Quest were in fact leading a conspiracy to overthrow him—Jax, indeed, was an aspirant [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]], who trained as the [[Sith apprentice/Legends|apprentice]] of [[Lumiya]].

At least two Sovereign Protectors were tasked with guarding a vital Imperial data center on [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]], escorting a [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|''Lambda''-class T-4a shuttle]] to the facility.
